indicators.name: couches
indicators.rationale: Couches are not suitable for computer work as they lack a flat surface for a keyboard and monitor.

indicators.name: table
indicators.rationale: The table is too small and lacks a flat surface for a keyboard and monitor.

indicators.name: low lighting
indicators.rationale: The lighting is insufficient for computer work, as it is not bright enough to reduce glare on the screen.

indicators.name: open layout
indicators.rationale: The open layout allows distractions and noise from other areas to enter the space.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The presence of couches and a small table makes it difficult to set up a proper workstation. The low lighting and open layout further contribute to the unsuitability of the space for focused solo work.
